# LakazAgri
> Free offline-first Android app for farm-to-buyer coordination across Sub-Saharan Africa. Developed in Mauritius.

## Positioning
LakazAgri targets agri-food systems across Sub-Saharan Africa — smallholder farmers, cooperatives, hotels, markets, traders and institutions. Mauritius is the development and pilot base, not the sole market.

## Site
- Homepage: https://lakazagri.mu/
- Contact: gilbert@mkweli.tech
- Phone: +230 5479 6356

## Product
Phase 1 lets farmers post crop availability and buyers post demand so both sides can plan, reduce waste and strengthen local and regional supply chains. Offline-first for rural connectivity.

## Related
- Sister product Mkweli AML: https://mkweli.tech/
- App releases: https://github.com/gilbertbouic/lakazAgri/releases
